title_original: Quantum Computing Stocks: Infleqtion Starts Trading As Public Company | Investor's Business Daily
summary_original: Quantum computing firm Infleqtion began trading as a public company following its merger with Churchill Capital Corp X, debuting under the ticker INFQ. On its first day, Infleqtion shares surged over 22% in early trading before moderating. This listing occurs as quantum computing stocks had generally underperformed in 2026 ahead of Infleqtion's entry to the market. The developments were reported by Investor's Business Daily on February 17, 2026. The news is notable as it highlights renewed investor attention and sentiment in the quantum computing sector amidst broader market volatility and tepid performance among peer companies this year.
